question: Give me a list of works of genre sonata composed in the 19th century by Norwegian composers
sparql:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sonata WHERE { ?sonata <http://data.doremus.org/ontology#U12_has_genre> ?genre . ?genre rdfs:label ?genreLabel . FILTER (CONTAINS(?genreLabel, 'sonata')) . ?sonata efrbroo:R17_created ?creation . ?creation dct:created ?date . FILTER (YEAR(?date) >= 1801 && YEAR(?date) <= 1900) }
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.46s
